goal: Fix import-resolver project-membership check: relative import targets that exist on disk (incl. .js->.ts extension mapping) must resolve as in-project edges, eliminating the 833 false relative_target_not_in_project unresolved edges. Rolling Phase-2 program: later phases fix Node-builtin misclassification (STUB-QT400D), tag test-origin edges + src-only counts (STUB-K5YBFN), and add probableBuiltinMember evidence flags (STUB-XX4JBC).

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/import-resolver.ts membership check + unresolved-edge-audit.md evidence; reproduce relative_target_not_in_project on 5 sampled edges (verify targets exist on disk via .js->.ts mapping)

Author failing unit test __tests__/pipeline/import-resolver-membership.test.ts: relative ./x.js specifier whose on-disk target is x.ts must classify as in-project resolved; negative case: genuinely-missing target stays relative_target_not_in_project

Fix project-membership check in import-resolver: extension-aware membership (.js/.mjs/.cjs specifier -> .ts/.tsx on-disk) using the same mapping the resolver already applies for path resolution; no locked-enum changes
npm run build && npx populate-coderef . ; diff validation-report.json against baseline: relative_target_not_in_project 833 -> ~0, valid_edge_count rises accordingly, 12-field shape unchanged
npx vitest full suite green (no ollama contention running)
Spot-check 3 formerly-unresolved imports via coderef-mcp-server what_imports; refresh docs/SCHEMA.md baseline numbers if shifted
Commit Phase 1 + push to main (integrator lane); update roadmap node PHASE-2.UNRESOLVED-EDGE-AUDIT progress

Discovery: classifyBareSpecifier (import-resolver), BUILTIN_RECEIVERS + classifyMethodCall/classifyBareCall (call-resolver), graph-builder kind->resolutionStatus mapping sites - confirm additive path with no locked-enum changes (kind=external + reason=node_builtin -> edge status builtin)

Failing tests __tests__/pipeline/builtin-classification.test.ts: (a) import path / node:fs / fs/promises -> reason=node_builtin, edge resolutionStatus=builtin; in-deps package stays external; unknown bare stays not_in_manifest; (b) namespace builtin receiver path.join() -> kind=builtin; (c) bare global parseInt() -> kind=builtin, project-shadowed name still resolves to project fn; (d) paired tests for each new BUILTIN_RECEIVERS entry (DR-PHASE-4-A)

Implement: import-resolver bare-specifier isBuiltin(node:module) check -> kind=external reason=node_builtin (AST + header paths); call-resolver BUILTIN_RECEIVERS += process/console/globalThis/Buffer/WeakMap/WeakSet/Proxy/BigInt/Intl/Atomics; builtin-module-import receiver branch -> kind=builtin; JS_GLOBAL_CALLEES zero-match branch -> kind=builtin (symbol table shadows globals); graph-builder maps reason=node_builtin -> resolutionStatus=builtin (AST + header import sites)
npm run build && repopulate; diff validation-report: builtin_count +~1100, unresolved_count -~1100, not_in_manifest_or_node_modules 487 -> ~34, 12-field shape unchanged
npx vitest run - full suite green; update any frozen-fixture invariants shifted by design with paired evidence (per stub note)
MCP validation_status reflects new counts; refresh docs/SCHEMA.md baseline + CHANGELOG entry
Commit Phase 2 + push to main; phase transition complete; roadmap progress note

Confirm chokepoints: buildEdgeRecord is the single edge-record site (tag there); output-validator buildReport for the two src-only counts; locked 12-field test at output-validation-report.test.ts; consumer sweep list (mcp-server ValidationReport + 12-field doc mentions)

Failing tests: graph-test-origin-tagging.test.ts (edges from __tests__/x.test.ts carry evidence.testOrigin=true; src edges carry no tag; report unresolved_src_count/ambiguous_src_count arithmetic correct) + bump REQUIRED_REPORT_FIELDS 12->14 in output-validation-report.test.ts with paired stability note

Implement: graph-builder isTestOriginFile (__tests__|.test.|.spec. regex) + evidence.testOrigin tag in buildEdgeRecord + EdgeEvidence intersection type; output-validator ValidationReport + buildReport gains unresolved_src_count/ambiguous_src_count (counts edges NOT tagged testOrigin); mcp-server ValidationReport interface + locked-schema description strings; graph semantics unchanged (no edge dropped, statuses untouched)
npm run build && repopulate; record src-only numbers (test-origin noise separated from src truth); 14-field shape verified
npx vitest run - full suite green (locked-schema test now asserts 14)
MCP validation_status returns 14 fields; 12-field doc sweep -> 14 (SCHEMA.md interface+baseline, AGENT-CONTRACT, API/ARCHITECTURE mentions); CHANGELOG entry
Commit Phase 3 + push to main; phase transition complete
